xposts.title: Physics as automata; physicalism from lowest causal layer
xposts.excerpt: Physics explores the highly successful idea that every phenomenon in the universe is ultimately reducible to a causally closed lowest layer, which can be described using automata. Physicalism is the position that our universe emerges directly from this layer.

xposts.title: Universe as hierarchy of automata; math as control problems
xposts.excerpt: Most people don't see mathematics as a library of automata and the universe as a hierarchy of increasingly difficult control problems. Math and physics are often seen as two complex realities...

xposts.title: Unreasonable effectiveness: simple compositional automata suffice
xposts.excerpt: The unreasonable effectiveness of mathematics is the expression of surprise that a small set of simple compositional automata is sufficient to model such a wide range of systems

xposts.title: Universe structure: wakes of nonexistence from all possible automata
xposts.excerpt: we can translate every working model of existence into a Turing machine, the structure of the universe might be given by wakes of nonexistence in a pattern generated by all possible automata which exist by default.

xposts.title: Physicalism: universe emergent over causally closed automata layer
xposts.excerpt: I think of physicalism as the hypothesis that our universe is directly emergent over a causally closed layer of automata; the alternative would be that our universe is being arbitrarily simulated in a symbolic computer.

xposts.title: Base reality as inevitable causal structure; automata vs simulacra
xposts.excerpt: Base level reality is the inevitable causal structure that gives rise to all observable causal patterns. Simulations are recreations of observable causal patterns using a different causal structure.

xposts.title: Automaton substrate; Logos as ideal organization of the automaton
xposts.excerpt: Logos is simply the automaton, the substrate in which we run. Christ does not represent the automaton itself, but an ideal aesthetic of its organization, in the form of a human prototype.

terms.title: automaton
terms.definition: A causally closed lowest layer or substrate generating all observable patterns via simple compositional rules; mathematics is its library and the universe a hierarchy of control problems over it.

terms.title: physicalism
terms.definition: Hypothesis that the universe emerges directly from a causally closed layer of automata rather than being arbitrarily simulated in a symbolic computer.
